## Definition of Done

Complete checklist: [docs/DEFINITION_OF_DONE.md](../docs/DEFINITION_OF_DONE.md)

Copy status into `docs/dod-status.md` (or attach completed checklist) and ensure CI `dod-gate` passes.

### DoD quick gate (required)

- [ ] Feature complete (no placeholders); existing behavior preserved
- [ ] Happy-path **and** failure-path tests added/updated
- [ ] API documented + OpenAPI updated (or N/A — no API change)
- [ ] FE+BE validation (or N/A — no user input)
- [ ] RBAC / ownership / 401|403 enforced (or N/A — public)
- [ ] UI loading/success/empty/error + responsive (or N/A — no UI)
- [ ] Migrations noted / applied (or N/A — no DB)
- [ ] Logging/audit where applicable
- [ ] Backward compatible (or approved breaking change linked)
- [ ] Manual happy + failure paths verified
